44.reason: [Accessing st[i-1] and st[i+1] when i=0 or near the end of the string leads to out-of-bounds access; also, loop runs to 1000000 regardless of actual string length, causing unnecessary output of null characters and potential undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [Accessing st[i-1] and st[i+1] when i=0 or near the end of the string leads to out-of-bounds access; also, loop runs to 1000000 regardless of actual string length, causing unnecessary output of null characters and potential undefined behavior.]
